items.body:
No API design or tooling issues found in this PR.

This is the initial `1.0.0-beta.1` release of `@azure/arm-alertprocessingrules`. All versions are aligned across `package.json`, `src/api/alertProcessingRulesManagementContext.ts`, and `CHANGELOG.md`. The `apiRefLink` correctly uses `?view=azure-node-preview` for a beta package. The public API surface in `review/arm-alertprocessingrules-node.api.md` has no naming violations (`_N` suffixes, `AutoGenerated` suffixes, or `_` prefixes), no type safety issues (`unknown` / incorrect `void`), and all exported symbols appear properly in the review file.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37788,"summary":"clean","findings":[]}
```

</details>
